JOIN pg_stat_activity b ON l.lockedby = b.pid

    i.relname AS index_name,
    idx_scan,
    idx_tup_read,
    idx_tup_fetch,

    pg_stat_user_indexes usi

JOIN
    pg_class i ON i.oid = usi.indexrelid
WHERE
    usi.relid = 'bookings.ticket_flights'::regclass;
